events.name: DeBuck's Tulip Festival
events.time: Wed-Fri 12:00 PM-8:00 PM, Sat-Sun 10:00 AM-8:00 PM
events.location: DeBuck's Family Farm, 50240 Martz Road, Belleville, MI 48111
events.description: DeBuck's official 2026 tulip festival page lists April 17-26 hours, 10 acres of tulips, rides, photo ops, and food. Facebook was publicly reachable only enough to recover the event URL and title, not a current 2026 event body.

events.name: Blake's 2nd Annual Tulip Festival
events.time: Mon-Thu rides start 11:00 AM and run until 4:00 PM, Fri-Sun rides start 8:00 AM and run until 5:00 PM
events.location: Blake's Orchard & Cider Mill, 17985 Armada Center Road, Armada, MI 48005
events.description: Blake Farms' In Bloom page says the tulip festival begins April 25 and runs into mid-May with 200,000+ tulips, train rides to the fields, seasonal drinks, and orchard photo spots. A matching public Facebook event URL was not recoverable from this environment, so this entry is based on the official event page.

events.name: Dog Dayze: An Orchard Walk in Spring
events.time: See event page for ticketed time slots
events.location: Blake's Orchard & Cider Mill, 17985 Armada Center Road, Armada, MI 48005
events.description: Blake Farms lists a spring orchard walk with live music, treats, dog-friendly activities, and a donation tie-in for Leader Dogs for the Blind. Facebook was publicly reachable enough to recover the event title and URL, but detailed current scheduling remained limited.

events.name: Farm to Glass Experience
events.description: Blake Farms' official event page advertises a four-course cider pairing dinner with seasonal ingredients and guided pairings. A matching public Facebook event URL was not recoverable from this environment, so this entry is based on the official event page.
